creator: peter@netkey.at
text:
Am 15.10.2012 20:00, schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of net-p2p/retroshare,
>
> Please note that PR ports/172731 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/172731

approved :)
